objective: Cycle 14 — Faction card boost weighting (q-20260415-010): rep>=50 cards get +3.0 weight
checkpoint: Faction boost weighting implemented. 3 files modified (merlin_card_system.gd, merlin_constants.gd, merlin_game_controller.gd). New static methods _get_card_faction_affinity() and _compute_faction_boost() extract faction from card effects and boost weight when rep>=50. FastRoute converted from random index to weighted selection. Event cards also boosted. Controller now passes faction_rep in context. FACTION_CONTENT_BOOST=3.0 constant added. 25 total bugs fixed across 14 cycles.
